no: Romance NPC for BG2EE/EET. Has multi-romance integration patches for De'Arnise Romance, Branwen, Amber, Dace, Ninde. Install after those mods. Very clingy.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Install order dependency, not incompatibility. Rjali explicitly detects De'Arnise Romance via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches it for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH. Install Rjali AFTER De'Arnise Romance.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 de'Arnise Romance for Baldur's Gate II
conflicts.source: Rjali multi.tpa has MOD_IS_INSTALLED check for deArnise, then patches its BCS/DLG files for multi-romance support. Designed to work together, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Install order dependency, not incompatibility. Rjali explicitly detects Branwen BG2 via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches it for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH. Install Rjali AFTER Branwen.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Branwen BG2 NPC mod for players and modders
conflicts.source: Rjali multi.tpa has MOD_IS_INSTALLED check for BRANWEN, then patches its BCS/DLG files for multi-romance support. Designed to work together, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Install Amber before Rjali. Rjali comp #3 detects Amber via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH.
conflicts.source: Rjali v12.5 multi.tpa checks MOD_IS_INSTALLED amber, patches M#Amber.bcs/dlg for multi-romance, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Install Dace before Rjali. Rjali comp #3 detects Dace via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH.
conflicts.source: Rjali v12.5 multi.tpa checks MOD_IS_INSTALLED dace, patches T#DACEJ.dlg for multi-romance, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Install Ninde before Rjali. Rjali comp #3 detects Ninde via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH.
conflicts.source: Rjali v12.5 multi.tpa checks MOD_IS_INSTALLED ninde, patches LK#NINDJ.dlg for multi-romance, 2026-03

sum: Adds Rjali as a romanceable NPC companion in BG2 SoA and ToB with extensive dialogue, quests, and equipment.

co.n: Rjali Romance Mod (BG2EE: SoA & ToB NPC)
co.tp2n: Rjali Romance Mod (BG2EE:SoA & TOB NPC) created by nullset
